description_long: This machine gun features a robust, angular metal receiver with a prominent ribbed barrel extending forward, suggesting enhanced heat dissipation. The weapon is supported by a sturdy bipod, providing stability for sustained fire, and is equipped with a large, box-shaped ammunition container mounted on the side, indicating a belt-fed system. The rear section includes a simple, straight stock and a visible charging handle, while the top of the receiver is fitted with iron sights for aiming. The overall finish is a mix of matte green and metallic gray, with some brown accents on the grip and stock. The design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and a rugged, functional appearance suitable for urban defense or suppression roles.
description: A rugged, belt-fed machine gun with a ribbed barrel, bipod support, box ammo container, and iron sights, finished in matte green and metallic gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed barrel, bipod legs, and the box ammunition container mounted on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the ribbed barrel, the bipod, and the side-mounted ammo box.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight stock, rear iron sight, and the symmetrical bipod legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the receiver, charging handle, and the bipod, with the ammo box visible underneath.
attribute_barrel_type: ribbed heavy barrel with cooling fins
attribute_stock_design: straight fixed stock with visible brown grip section
attribute_magazine_type: belt-fed with side-mounted box ammunition container
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: fixed rear aperture with front post
